value.found_quote: If you deploy a `managed-mcp.json` file, Claude Code loads only the servers that file defines. Users cannot add, modify, or use any other MCP servers, including plugin-provided servers.
value.rationale: The page describes managed-mcp.json as a configuration file that deploys a fixed set of MCP servers with exclusive control, and also covers allowlists/denylists (allowedMcpServers/deniedMcpServers) to filter which servers load. This matches the claim. It is presented as a current capability with platform paths and version requirements, indicating active status.
